final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 character expression grid for 赵灵儿 from 仙剑奇侠传 IP (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation, Pixar-style aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 3x3 grid layout (3 rows × 3 columns = 9 panels total), each panel featuring the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include 赵灵儿 character base: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses; must include all 9 expression/action/outfit variations:
  Panel 1 (top-left): winking expression, adjusting glasses action, green sweater outfit
  Panel 2 (top-center): smirking expression, lowering dark sunglasses action, red leather jacket outfit
  Panel 3 (top-right): thinking expression, finger on chin action, yellow hoodie outfit
  Panel 4 (middle-left): big smile expression, arms resting on edge action, black and white striped shirt outfit
  Panel 5 (middle-center): smiling expression, thumbs up action, orange button-up shirt outfit
  Panel 6 (middle-right): neutral expression, drinking boba tea action, blue sweater outfit
  Panel 7 (bottom-left): happy expression, waving action, purple sweater vest over white shirt outfit
  Panel 8 (bottom-center): laughing with eyes closed expression, arms crossed action, pink cardigan outfit
  Panel 9 (bottom-right): silly expression, poking cheeks action, teal sweater outfit
Scene/backdrop: must include torn hole in white paper framing device repeated across all 9 panels
Lighting/mood: needs consistent lighting across all 9 panels — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "赵灵儿" character name if any labeling appears
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve all 9 panel specifications exactly as listed; must maintain character consistency across all expressions
Avoid:
